user_query: Can you help me find all the NFTs owned by my friend's Ethereum address '0x8e7644918b3e280fb3b599ca381a4efcb7ade202'? I would like to obtain the metadata, attributes, and enclosed media for each NFT. Please provide the contract address, token ID, title, description, external view URL, and media.

TaskList.description: Fetch all NFTs associated with the specified Ethereum address.
Retrieve the metadata for each NFT found in step 1, including contract address, token ID, title, and description.
Get external view URL and media information for each NFT using the metadata obtained in step 2.
